name: ANJI Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: ANJI Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells solar modules in Taiwan. The company offers poly and mono crystalline, double glass, and building integrated photovoltaic solar modules, as well as AC modules. Its products are used in power generation systems. The company also provides 3D printing services. ANJI Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in T√É¬°in√É¬°n, Taiwan.
